requirement_topic.en: Safety Baseline — IEC 61851 and Harsh-Environment Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 安全基线——IEC 61851及恶劣环境降额
requirement_topic.zht: 安全基線——IEC 61851及惡劣環境降額

summary.en: Because no Eritrea-specific EVSE safety regulation or strong national standards-body route was confirmed, project specifications should use IEC 61851 as the safety baseline. IEC 61851-1 covers conductive EVSE general requirements, including control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, protection against electric shock, interlocks, overcurrent protection, isolation monitoring where applicable, and temperature limits. IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV supply equipment. Eritrea's hot, dusty Horn of Africa operating conditions require enclosure ingress protection, thermal derating, surge protection, corrosion review, and maintainability evidence beyond a temperate factory-default design.
summary.zh: 由于未能确认厄立特里亚存在专门的EVSE安全法规或强有力的国家标准机构路径，项目规范应以IEC 61851作为安全基线。IEC 61851-1涵盖传导式电动汽车供电设备通用要求，包括控制导引、保护接地、防触电、互锁、过流保护、适用时绝缘监测和温度限值。IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车供电设备。厄立特里亚位于非洲之角，运行环境炎热、多尘，需要在温带出厂默认设计之外提供外壳防护、热降额、浪涌保护、防腐审查和可维护性证据。
summary.zht: 由於未能確認厄利垂亞存在專門的EVSE安全法規或強有力的國家標準機構路徑，項目規範應以IEC 61851作為安全基線。IEC 61851-1涵蓋傳導式電動汽車供電設備通用要求，包括控制導引、保護接地、防觸電、互鎖、過流保護、適用時絕緣監測和溫度限值。IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車供電設備。厄利垂亞位於非洲之角，運行環境炎熱、多塵，需要在溫帶出廠默認設計之外提供外殼防護、熱降額、浪湧保護、防腐審查和可維護性證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IEC 62262 — IK mechanical impact protection where specified

summary.en: China's comparable safety baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by China connector and communication standards such as GB/T 20234 and GB/T 27930. GB/T 18487.1-2023 can be useful as a clause-mapping starting point, but it embeds China-specific connector and communication assumptions and does not prove IEC 61851 conformity for an Eritrea IEC-based project.
summary.zh: 中国可比安全基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并由GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930等中国接口及通信标准支撑。GB/T 18487.1-2023可作为逐条映射起点，但其包含中国特有接口和通信假设，不能证明厄立特里亚IEC体系项目符合IEC 61851。
summary.zht: 中國可比安全基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並由GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930等中國接口及通訊標準支撐。GB/T 18487.1-2023可作為逐條映射起點，但其包含中國特有接口和通訊假設，不能證明厄利垂亞IEC體系項目符合IEC 61851。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, protection-device ratings, emergency-stop and isolation-monitoring evidence where applicable, IP and IK certificates, installation instructions, and thermal derating calculations for hot and dusty conditions. A China GB/T 18487 report alone should not be presented as an Eritrea project safety file.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、保护器件额定值、适用时急停及绝缘监测证据、IP和IK证书、安装说明，以及适用于炎热多尘环境的热降额计算。单独的中国GB/T 18487报告不应作为厄立特里亚项目安全文件提交。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、保護器件額定值、適用時急停及絕緣監測證據、IP和IK證書、安裝說明，以及適用於炎熱多塵環境的熱降額計算。單獨的中國GB/T 18487報告不應作為厄利垂亞項目安全文件提交。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific / IEC baseline — no confirmed Eritrea EVSE safety regulation identified; IEC 61851 evidence should be required by prudent project specifications
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487.1-2023 applies to China domestic EVSE design and does not substitute for IEC 61851 project evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 as the Eritrea project safety baseline, then add heat, dust, ingress-protection, surge, and maintainability evidence. GB/T 18487.1-2023 is a useful China baseline but not a substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应以IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23作为厄立特里亚项目安全基线，并增加炎热、粉尘、防护等级、浪涌和可维护性证据。GB/T 18487.1-2023是有用的中国基线，但不能替代IEC证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應以IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23作為厄利垂亞項目安全基線，並增加炎熱、粉塵、防護等級、浪湧和可維護性證據。GB/T 18487.1-2023是有用的中國基線，但不能替代IEC證據。
